page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.6xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.u2a family. It is built on the KVM hypervisor and runs on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 24 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC processor operating at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, hyperthreading is not utilized, ensuring that each of the 24 virtual CPUs corresponds directly to a dedicated physical core.

The server is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 7 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention from other tenants. This hardware profile is appropriate for workloads such as web serving, application servers, enterprise applications, and databases that require predictable compute performance and a balanced memory footprint without the need for local high-speed storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.6xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance within the ecs.u2a family, running on the KVM hypervisor. Powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC processor operating at 2.25 GHz, the server provides 24 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. It features 96.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage options, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps. With its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated compute resources, this instance is designed for predictable performance. It is suited for general-purpose workloads, including application servers, web serving, and enterprise applications that require consistent CPU performance and a balanced memory allocation.
